CONTINUED FOR JUDGE MITCHELL TO HEAR CASE. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

DEFNEDANT'S SON WAS ASKED TO COMPLETE A DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE, WHICH HE DID BUT DID NOT SUBMIT TO THE CLERK.. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF NOV-17-2011 IS CONTINUED STIPULATION OF THE PARTIES TO DEC-12-2011 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. BOTH PARTIES PRESENT AND HAVE AGREED THAT THE DEFENDANT IS GOING TO CONTACT PLAINTIFF'S CUSTOMER AND RESOLVE ISSUE REGARDING MISSING PACKAGES. PARTIES REQUEST A 2 WEEK CONTINUANCE. IF NO APPEARANCE, ORDER OF EXAMINATION WILL BE DISCHARGED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
